description_long: This stool features a simple, geometric design with an octagonal seat and three straight, sturdy legs. The seat is flat and broad, with a slightly beveled edge that adds a subtle visual distinction between the top and the sides. The legs are evenly spaced and extend vertically downward, providing stable support for the seat. The color palette is dominated by dark gray and black tones, giving the stool a modern and understated appearance. The surface appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, with a matte finish that suggests durability and resistance to scratches. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or footrest, emphasizing its utilitarian and minimalist style.
description: A dark, octagonal stool with three straight legs and a flat, beveled seat, finished in matte black and gray tones.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from a slight angle, showing the octagonal seat and all three legs, with the beveled edge clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile of the stool, emphasizing the thickness of the seat and the straightness of the legs.
description_view_2: The stool is viewed more directly from the front, showing the symmetry of the three legs and the broad, flat seat.
description_view_3: This angle shows the stool from another side, again displaying the beveled seat edge and the even spacing of the legs.
